service.heading: Our Core Services
service.subheading: Reliable maintenance, fire protection, and intelligent building solutions you can trust

about.heading: Engineering Strength.
about.des:
HBC Group provides expert industrial maintenance, machinery
              service, and plant relocation across the US and Europe. We combine
              European engineering excellence with local support to deliver 24/7
              solutions that keep operations running reliably. Our services span
              preventive maintenance, diagnostics, overhauls, fire protection,
              and smart building solutions—helping clients maximize uptime,
              extend asset life, and operate with confidence.
about.subdes:
More than service — we’re your partner in protecting
                  investments, ensuring safety, and powering progress.

value.title: Why Choose HBC Group
value.des:
Our foundation is built on expertise, trust, and innovation — here
            are the values that define us.

experience.title: Proven Experience
experience.des: Over a decade of hands-on expertise in industrial maintenance, relocation, and smart technology integration — delivering precision and reliability across Europe and the USA.

partnership.title: Trusted Partnership
partnership.des: Recognized as a dependable partner for both global corporations and individuals, built on long-term relationships, transparency, and delivering on promises.

innovation.title: Innovation-Driven
innovation.des: Combining engineering excellence with the latest smart solutions and green technologies, ensuring clients stay ahead in efficiency and sustainability.

reliability.title: End-to-End Reliability
reliability.des: From diagnostics and preventive maintenance to complete relocations and smart home solutions — we provide 24/7 support that guarantees continuity and peace of mind.

flexibility.title: Tailored Flexibility
flexibility.des: Customized strategies for every client — whether large-scale industrial operations or individual smart homes — ensuring unique needs are met with precision.

commitment.title: Unwavering Commitment
commitment.des: Dedicated to every project with integrity, accountability, and excellence — we stand by our clients from start to finish, no matter the challenge.

industrial.label: Industrial
industrial.title: From Uptime to Upgrades — We’ve Got You Covered
industrial.des:
Precision maintenance, integrated security, and complex relocations engineered for uptime.
At HBC Group, we go beyond simple repairs — we deliver complete lifecycle care for heavy industries. From hydraulic and electrical systems to mechanical structures, welding, and programming, our expertise ensures every machine runs at peak performance.

We also safeguard operations with advanced fire protection, camera networks, servers, entry systems, and alarms, tailored for industrial scale. And when it comes to growth, our teams handle dismantling, relocation, rebuilding, and new construction projects — seamlessly and with minimal downtime.

Our promise: less disruption, more productivity, and reliability without compromise.

Fire.label: Fire Protection
Fire.title: Advanced Fire Protection
Fire.des:
Engineered coatings and treatments that shield structures against extreme fire conditions.
          
Our solutions form a protective barrier that resists ignition, slows spread, and preserves structural integrity. From wood preservation for natural materials to film technologies that protect facades and exteriors, we deliver long-lasting defense with minimal maintenance — a new standard in resilience, safety, and sustainability.

intelligent.title: Smarter Homes, Greener Living
intelligent.label: Intelligent Building
intelligent.des:
Comfort, security, and energy intelligence — beautifully connected.
At HBC Group, we transform houses into smart living spaces that think ahead. From automation systems that adapt to your daily routines, to solar integration, energy monitoring, and home security, we make modern living effortless and secure.

But our vision doesn’t stop at homes. With our Shop Green Products, individuals and small businesses can access sustainable solutions across accessories, agriculture, concrete, construction, energy, and soil management. Every product is designed to be durable, eco-conscious, and future-ready.

Our mission: smarter homes, greener choices, and a lifestyle built for tomorrow.

it.label: IT Solutions
it.title: Ship Faster, Scale Smarter — Secure by Design
it.des:
We design and build modern digital products end-to-end: software, cloud, AI automation, and secure integrations.
From product discovery and UX to APIs, data pipelines, and observability, we deliver measurable outcomes and long-term maintainability.

hero.title: Our Service,
hero.description:
HBC Group is your fast, reliable and quality oriented partner for industrial maintenance and machinery service.

We help you with your most demanding challenges.

From preventive or recurring maintenance and diagnostic to  fast responds trouble-shooting or complex relocation of assembly lines.

hydraulics.title: Hydraulics
hydraulics.text: Diagnostics, pump/valve service, hoses, sealing, filtration, and contamination control. We restore force and motion with micron-level precision.

electrical.title: Electrical
electrical.text: Control panels, drives, PLCs, sensors, power routing. We do clean installs and retrofit wiring with safety and clarity.

mechanical.title: Mechanical
mechanical.text: Gearboxes, conveyors, bearings, shaft alignment, structural fabrication—built to take industrial punishment.

welding.title: Welding
welding.text: Certified welding and on-site fabrication for production lines and heavy assets. Strong, clean, inspected.

programming.title: Programming
programming.text: Commissioning and optimization of PLC/HMI code. We make machines think smarter and operators work faster.

items.title: Preventive & Predictive
items.desc: Programs that turn unplanned downtime into scheduled optimization.

items.title: Rapid Response
items.desc: On-call engineers and techs with parts, tools, and checklists.

items.title: Retrofits & Upgrades
items.desc: Make old assets compete like new—mechanical, electrical, controls.

items.title: Data Visibility
items.desc: From sensor to dashboard: we surface signals that matter.

items.title: Safety First
items.desc: Certified procedures and tooling for plant & personnel safety.

items.title: Documentation
items.desc: As-builts, wiring, naming standards—clarity for the next decade.

fire.title: Fire Protection
fire.brief: Design, install, and maintain robust fire systems for industrial risk categories with traceability and standards compliance.

facades.label: Facades
facades.desc: Exterior systems for resistance and longevity.

cameras.title: Cameras & Analytics
cameras.brief: From harsh-environment cameras to smart detection. Gain visual certainty across plants, yards, and warehouses.

servers.title: Server & Storage
servers.brief: Hardened, scalable infrastructure for security and industrial data—designed for write-heavy workloads.

entry.title: Entry & Alarm Systems
entry.brief: Card, PIN, biometric, and vehicle entry solutions. Unified alarms with clear playbooks and escalation.

items.title: Machines dismantled, relocated, rebuilt
items.desc: We move production assets safely: labeling, disassembly, transport, alignment, recommissioning.

items.title: New Construction
items.desc: From utilities to final commissioning—MEP routing, cable trays, controls, safety systems.

steps.title: Assess
steps.desc: Site study, risk review, and performance targets.

steps.title: Plan
steps.desc: Scope, phases, access, safety, and spares.

steps.title: Execute
steps.desc: Qualified teams, QA checks, and reporting.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can you work alongside our in-house engineers?
faq.a1: Yes. We frequently co-deliver with plant teams and adapt to your maintenance windows and standards.
faq.a2: Always. We hand over wiring diagrams, naming standards, PLC/HMI backups, test reports, and photos.
faq.a3: Permits, isolation/LOTO, tooling checks, and trained personnel. We plan safety from day zero.
faq.q4: How can I schedule a consultation?
faq.a4Rich: You can easily schedule a meeting through our <link>Corporate Meeting Request</link> page.

cta.title: Let’s keep your plant moving.
cta.description: Book time with our industrial team to map the quickest path to uptime, safety, and performance.

hero.title: Fire Protection
hero.description: From wood preservation to architectural facades and system integration — we bring safety, beauty, and compliance together.

wood.title: Wood Preservation
wood.desc: Special coatings and treatments to reduce flammability of structural wood elements, increasing fire resistance and extending lifespan.

film.title: Film Protection
film.desc: Transparent films for windows, walls and doors that slow flame spread and limit heat transfer, while preserving aesthetics.

facade.title: Façade Systems
facade.desc: Architectural fire-safe façade materials and designs that prevent flame and smoke propagation across building exteriors.

suppression.name: Suppression & Extinguishers
suppression.desc: Design and install automatic sprinkler, gas, or foam suppression systems tailored to use-case and hazard.

alarm.name: Alarm & Detection
alarm.desc: Smoke, heat, and flame sensors, wired and wireless, integrated with control panels and remote alerts.

maintenance.name: Maintenance & Audits
maintenance.desc: Regular testing, inspection and certification of fire systems to ensure compliance and readiness.

items.title: Code & Standards Expertise
items.desc: We navigate NFPA, EN, UL standards so your system passes inspection, not just installation.

items.title: Holistic Safety Design
items.desc: We guard structure, contents, egress and systems — not just fire suppression.

items.title: Predictive Health Monitoring
items.desc: Sensors detect early faults (leaks, pressure drops, tampering) before failure happens.

items.title: Emergency Response Integration
items.desc: We tie systems into panels, security, and building operations to act fast when every second counts.

items.name: Wood-Frame Housing Complex
items.desc: Applied fire-retardant coatings to all timber structural elements. Passed regulatory inspection with margin.

items.name: Commercial Façade Retrofit
items.desc: Replaced aging cladding with fire-safe façade system while maintaining aesthetic transparency.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do fire-retardant coatings affect wood aesthetics?
faq.a1: Modern coatings are transparent or tinted lightly and minimally alter texture. We test before applying in-situ.
faq.q2: How often must systems be maintained?
faq.a2: Typical inspection cycles are monthly to annually depending on system type. We support full audit logs and reminders.
faq.q3: Can I integrate fire systems with building automation?
faq.a3: Yes. We build interfaces so suppression, alarms, and sensors talk to your smart building or BMS.

cta.title: Elevate Your Safety. Protect What Matters.
cta.description: Contact HBC to design or upgrade your fire protection systems with intelligence, compliance, and durability built in.

items.title: PV & Energy

items.title: Comfort
items.desc: Lighting, climate and shading that adapts to you.

items.title: Savings
items.desc: Data-driven optimization that cuts waste, not comfort.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need an existing smart-home hub?
faq.a1: Not necessarily. We can integrate with your current ecosystem or deploy a robust, secure HBC stack — whichever delivers reliability with the least friction.
faq.q2: Can I start small and expand later?
faq.a2: Yes. Begin with one priority (e.g., energy monitoring). We design for modular growth, so features can be added as your needs evolve.
faq.q3: How do you protect my data?
faq.a3: We design with privacy-by-default, secure server systems, and least-privilege access. Your data stays yours, encrypted in motion and at rest.

cta.title: Let’s make your building intelligent — and efficient.
cta.description: We’ll map the best path for comfort, safety and savings with a focus on reliability.

hero.title: Build,Scale & Secure
hero.description:
We design and ship high-performance software, Web3 payments, and cloud infrastructure—engineered for uptime, security, and growth.

From SaaS platforms and e-commerce to AI automation and blockchain, we deliver end-to-end solutions with measurable impact.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How soon can your team begin a project?
faq.a1: Our team typically responds within one business day. A discovery meeting can be scheduled within 48–72 hours to define scope, priorities, and expected milestones. Once aligned, onboarding and kickoff begin immediately.
faq.q2: Do you provide complete frontend and backend development?
faq.a2: Yes. We deliver full-stack solutions covering frontend, backend, and infrastructure. Our teams specialize in modern web frameworks, scalable APIs, databases, and CI/CD pipelines—ensuring consistent quality across the entire product lifecycle.
faq.q3: Can you integrate emerging technologies such as AI or Web3 into existing platforms?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We design secure, standards-compliant integrations that extend your current systems with AI automation, data intelligence, or blockchain functionality. Each integration includes documentation, testing, and rollback strategies to ensure stability.
faq.q4: How do you manage project communication and progress tracking?
faq.a4: Each client receives a dedicated project manager and access to our collaboration workspace. We provide transparent weekly updates, milestone reviews, and real-time dashboards for progress, risks, and deliverables.
faq.a5: We work with clients across finance, manufacturing, e-commerce, education, and technology. Our flexible architecture approach allows us to adapt quickly to any regulated or data-sensitive environment.

software.title: Software Development
software.text: We engineer end-to-end digital products — from concept to global rollout. Our team builds scalable, secure, and high-performance applications for web, mobile, and desktop, using modern technologies and clean architecture principles. We ensure every solution is modular, maintainable, and ready for future integrations.

cloud.title: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.text: We design, deploy, and maintain cloud infrastructures built for high availability, resilience, and compliance. Our DevOps approach ensures smooth delivery pipelines, continuous monitoring, and cost-efficient scaling across major global providers such as AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.text: We transform data into intelligent action. From natural-language chatbots to predictive analytics and automated workflows, our AI solutions help organizations make smarter decisions, reduce human error, and enhance customer experiences.

web3.title: Blockchain & Web3
web3.text: We build secure, compliant, and scalable decentralized systems across the strongest blockchain networks — including Ethereum, BNB Chain, Polygon, and Avalanche. Our Web3 expertise spans token ecosystems, smart contracts, and payment infrastructures that merge blockchain innovation with real-world utility.

security.title: Security & Integration
security.text: Security is built into every layer of our process — from application design to production operations. We implement advanced identity management, data encryption, and compliance frameworks to protect both users and infrastructure, while seamlessly integrating your systems for operational clarity and trust.

api.title: API-first Delivery
api.desc: Clean GraphQL/REST contracts, SDKs, and docs for partners.

devops.title: DevOps by Default
devops.desc: CI/CD, monitoring, logs/metrics/traces from day one.

security.title: Security Mindset
security.desc: SSO/IAM, secrets hygiene, dependency checks, audits.

performance.title: Performance
performance.desc: Edge-ready caching, DB tuning, and Lighthouse-friendly UX.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.desc: Event-driven microservices and message queues where they matter.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Playbooks, runbooks, ADRs, and handover guides.

discover.title: Discover
discover.desc: We begin with stakeholder workshops, success metrics, and risk mapping. Every engagement starts with a deep understanding of your business objectives, technical landscape, and compliance boundaries.

design.title: Design
design.desc: Our architects and designers translate goals into scalable architectures, UX flows, and technical proofs of concept. We emphasize performance, security, and usability from day one.

build.title: Build
build.desc: We execute through agile sprints with continuous integration, test automation, and observability. Each iteration delivers measurable outcomes and production-ready increments.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.desc: Blue/green and canary strategies ensure safe, zero-downtime releases. Every deployment includes rollback policies, monitoring dashboards, and documentation.

scale.title: Scale & Optimize
scale.desc: After go-live, we refine performance, cost, and reliability. Proactive monitoring, incident response, and SLA adherence guarantee long-term operational excellence.

meeting.title: Schedule a Meeting
meeting.intro: Speak with an engineer to map the best path for industrial uptime, smart living, and safety. We’ll tailor the conversation to your goals.

items.q: Can you use my existing devices?
items.a: In many cases yes. We audit current gear and integrate compatible devices via KNX, Matter, Zigbee or bridges.

items.q: Do I need wiring or can it be wireless?
items.a: Both are possible. New builds favor wired backbones; renovations can use secure, reliable wireless where suitable.
Yes—wall panel and mobile app with remote access, notifications, scenes and user roles.
Local-first control where possible, strong encryption for remote access, and clear data retention settings.

hero.title: Build, service, and innovate with HBC Group
hero.subtitle: We’re growing across electrical, mechanical, and automation roles. Explore open positions and apply in minutes.

industrial-mechanic.location: United States (Nationwide travel may be required)
industrial-mechanic.summary: Field service, diagnostics, repairs, and preventive maintenance on heavy-duty industrial machinery (mobile and stationary).

industrial-programmer.location: United States (Nationwide travel may be required)
industrial-programmer.summary: Program, optimize, and commission PLC-based control systems for complex heavy-duty machinery; troubleshoot software/communications; deliver on-site support.
